descs.desc:
[WhenUse] At 10+ ([Breath] on self + [Burst] on target), Coin Power +1
[WhenUse] Gain +2 [Breath] Count
coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 1 [Burst]
[CriticalOnSucceedAttack] If this unit has [SnakeStance], inflict 1 [Burst]

descs.desc:
[WhenUse] Coin Power +1 for every 10 ([Breath] on self + [Burst] on target) (max 2)
[WhenUse] Gain +2 [Breath] Count
coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 1 [Burst]
[CriticalOnSucceedAttack] If this unit has [SnakeStance], inflict 2 [Burst]

descs.desc:
[WhenUse] At 10+ ([Breath] on self + [Burst] on target), Coin Power +1
[WinDuel] Inflict +2 [Burst] Count
[WinDuel] Gain +2 [Breath] Count
coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] At 30+ [Breath], consume 10 [Breath] on self to Reuse Coin once (1 time max)
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict [BurstPoison]

descs.desc:
[WhenUse] Coin Power +1 for every 10 ([Breath] on self + [Burst] on target) (max 2)

[WinDuel] Gain +2 [Breath] Count
coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] At 30+ [Breath], consume 10 [Breath] on self to Reuse Coin once (1 time max)
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict [BurstPoison]
[CriticalOnSucceedAttack] Gain 1 [SnakeStance]

descs.desc:
[WideAreaRampage]
[WhenUse] At 10+ ([Breath] on self + [Burst] on the main target), Coin Power +1
[WhenUse] Gain Clash Power equal to [SnakeStance] on self
[WhenUse] Gain 3 [SnakeStance]
[WinDuel] Inflict +1 [Burst] Count against all targets
coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict +1 [Burst] Count
[CriticalOnSucceedAttack] Reduce [BurstPoison] on target by 1
[CriticalOnSucceedAttack] Reuse this Coin once (2 times per Skill)

descs.desc:
[WideAreaRampage]
[WhenUse] Coin Power +1 for every 10 ([Breath] on self + [Burst] on the main target) (max 2)

[WhenUse] Gain 3 [SnakeStance]
[WinDuel] Inflict +1 [Burst] Count on all targets

[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict +1 [Burst] Count
[CriticalOnSucceedAttack] Reduce [BurstPoison] on target by 1

descs.desc:
[CanDuelGuard]
[StartBattle] Gain 3 [SnakeStance] next turn
[WhenUse] At 10+ [Breath] Count, Coin Power +1

1091201.name: Heishou Mutation [Si]
1091201.desc:
If this unit has [SnakeStance], deal +5% damage
If target has [BurstPoison], deal +5% damage

1091221.name: Intravascular Venom
1091221.desc: When 1 ally with the fastest Speed inflicts [Burst] damage to an enemy, inflict 1 [AttackDown] and 1 [DefenseDown] next turn (once per turn)
